title: Smoky Korean Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful vegetarian bowl filled with the taste of Korea, featuring smoky tofu and crispy rice.
instructions: 1. Cook the brown rice according to package instructions.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, toasted sesame oil, and korean chili flakes.
3. Add cubed smoked tofu to the marinade and toss to coat.
4. In a large skillet or wok, heat 1 tablespoon of toasted sesame oil over medium-high heat.
5. Add the marinated tofu and cook until golden brown, about 5-7 minutes.
6. In a separate pan, toast the sesame seeds over low heat, stirring frequently, until fragrant.
7. To assemble the bowls, place a scoop of cooked brown rice on the bottom.
8. Add the cooked tofu on top of the rice.
9. Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds, green onions, and a pinch of salt over the tofu.
10. Drizzle the remaining toasted sesame oil and serve immediately.
